mapper.select: SELECT id,source,category,event_type,severity,database_name,user_name,object_name, query_id,sql_state,message,fingerprint,payload,sensitive_redacted,event_time,collected_at FROM pg_operational_snapshot WHERE ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT category,event_type,severity,count(*) event_count,count(DISTINCT fingerprint) fingerprint_count, max(event_time) last_seen FROM pg_operational_snapshot WHERE collected_at>=GREATEST(#{from},now()-INTERVAL '5 minutes') GROUP BY category,event_type,severity ORDER BY event_count DESC

SELECT id,source,category,event_type,severity,database_name,user_name,object_name, query_id,sql_state,message,fingerprint,payload,sensitive_redacted,event_time,collected_at FROM pg_operational_event WHERE ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT category,event_type,severity,count(*) event_count,count(DISTINCT fingerprint) fingerprint_count, max(event_time) last_seen FROM pg_operational_event WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId} AND category<>'audit' AND event_time>=#{from} GROUP BY category,event_type,severity ORDER BY event_count DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM pg_restore_drill WHERE instance_id=#{instanceId}
